title.zh: SymPy partitions：避免迭代结果共享可变字典
title.en: SymPy partitions: avoid shared mutable dictionaries in iterator results

summary.zh: 审查一个 SymPy iterator PR：作者在 partitions() 返回分区字典时复制结果，避免收集列表后被后续迭代改写。
summary.en: Review a SymPy iterator PR: the author copies partition dictionaries before yielding them so collected results are not mutated by later iterations.

reviewTarget.note: Adapted from a real upstream issue for review training. Whether this change should be merged is the question — reach your own conclusion before opening the source links.

pr.title: Copy partition dictionaries before yielding iterator results
pr.author: codegen-agent
body: partitions() mutates a working dictionary while generating results. Users who collect the generator into a list can observe earlier yielded dictionaries changing as later partitions are produced.
This PR returns ms.copy() from the dictionary-yield paths so callers receive stable snapshots instead of the internal working object.
Added a regression test for partitions(..., size=True) to ensure the yielded sizes remain correct when results are collected. Existing combinatorics tests pass.

background: partitions() is a generator that reuses an internal dictionary while enumerating integer partitions.
The function has two output modes: size=False yields a dictionary; size=True yields a tuple of (size, dictionary).
The review context includes the pre-patch yield branches in src-iterables.py.

notes: The patch copies only the size=False dictionary yields. In size=True mode it still returns tuples containing the same mutable working dictionary, so collected results are still corrupted by later iterations.
The added test checks only the numeric size component. That can remain correct even while every tuple's dictionary points at the same final mutated object.
The fix should copy the dictionary in every yield branch that exposes it and tests should assert object identity or stable dictionary contents for both output modes.

learningGoal: 识别迭代器可变对象复用在不同输出模式下的 API 回归。

terms.description: 多次 yield 同一个可变对象，后续修改会影响之前结果。
生成器返回值应能被用户安全保存和比较。
partitions() 返回 (分区大小, 分区字典) 的模式。
复制字典本身，避免共享同一个可变对象。

behaviorChecks.expected: 列表中每个 dict 应独立。
behaviorChecks.reviewQuestion: 普通模式是否返回快照？

behaviorChecks.expected: tuple 里的 dict 也应独立。
behaviorChecks.reviewQuestion: size=True 分支是否也复制了 dict？

behaviorChecks.input: 用户保存第一个 yield 的 dict 后继续迭代
behaviorChecks.expected: 已保存结果不应随内部工作字典变化。
behaviorChecks.reviewQuestion: 测试是否检查对象 identity 或内容稳定性？
